Package io.forja.components.charts.fxHeatmap

Class FxHeatmap

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
io.forja.components.charts.fxHeatmap.FxHeatmap
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxHeatmap extends javafx.scene.layout.Region
A grid heatmap — rectangular cells colored by value between getLowColor() and getHighColor().

Data is a 2D array double[rows][cols]; missing rows are treated as empty. Values below getMin() / above getMax() are clamped.

Builder usage:

     
      FxHeatmap hm = FxHeatmap.builder()
          .data(new double[][]{{1, 2, 3},{4, 5, 6}})
          .min(0).max(6)
          .build();
See Also:
